sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84044" key="pneumatokh/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πνευμᾰτο-κήλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84044.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aneurysmal varicocele,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
